1.premise: Watching a more successful comedian get roasted makes nine years of comedy feel wasted.
Turkey's cultural attitude toward happiness inverts the children's song into a warning.
Making America great again just requires living somewhere worse long enough to reset expectations.

lines.text: It was very fun watching what you guys did to that guy over there.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Because he's more successful than me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm shit. I'm like, "I've never fucking done comedy."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I never felt more like I wasted nine years of my life than right now.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I, like, I shat myself. It just went inside, back in the day.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm from Turkey. It's not a happy place, you know.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: state motto is if you're happy and you know it
lines.label: setup

lines.text: it doesn't look good, it doesn't matter.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But I was there for two years, like I lived in LA for a long time
lines.label: setup

lines.text: then I moved back there and then I came back here
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I like in this time I realized how to make America great again actually
lines.label: setup

lines.text: what you do is you go live in Turkey for two years
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and then you come back and it's fucking spectacular again.
lines.label: punchline
